articles.title: Export push, free trade agreements dominate DPIIT’s UP industry meet
articles.description: DPIIT’s Lucknow outreach meet with Invest UP urged firms to use FTAs, boost exports and ease compliance, highlighting reforms and UP’s Nivesh Mitra 3.0.

articles.title: Gyms, libraries, solar lights boost Sarojini Nagar’s development
articles.description: Sarojini Nagar, Lucknow sees community-led growth with 106 open-air gyms, 62 libraries, solar projects, parks, 1,800 solar lights, and smart classrooms.

articles.title: HMDA plan to auction land worth Rs 1k cr in Banjara Hills hit by row over ownership
articles.description: Hyderabad: A high-stakes land auction planned by the Hyderabad Metropolitan Development Authority (HMDA) in the heart of Banjara Hills has run into co.

articles.title: PGI GB meet deferred, key decisions on hold
articles.description: PGI governing body meeting in New Delhi postponed due to JP Nadda’s unavailability, delaying decisions on senior resident posts, seat increases and new faculty roles.

articles.title: Adani Energy to buy IntelliSmart for ₹3,050 crore
articles.description: Adani Energy Solutions (AESL) is set to acquire smart metering company IntelliSmart Infrastructure for ₹3,050 crore, bolstering its position as India's largest smart metering platform with over 47 million meters. This strategic move aligns with India's ambitious plan to replace 250 million conventional electricity meters with smart meters to modernize the power distribution ecosystem and reduce losses.

articles.title: AAL Stock Pops As Google Deal And Falling Oil Prices Lift Airlines
articles.description: The jump in share price also aligns with a broader rise in airline stocks such as United Airlines (UAL) and Delta Air Lines (DAL), driven by a sharp drop in oil prices.

articles.title: RTO services come to a halt as employees stage statewide strike
articles.description: Nagpur: Routine services at the Regional Transport Office (RTO) came to a complete standstill on Monday as employees in Nagpur, and across Maharashtra.

articles.title: Ravi Nagar Square Gridlocked AsPvt Buses, Food Stalls Clog Road
articles.description: Nagpur: A key junction on the busy Amravati Road stretch has turned into a daily choke point, with residents around Ravi Nagar Square alleging rampant.

articles.title: US stock markets today (June 9, 2026): AI stocks rebound, easing oil prices lift Wall Street
articles.description: Indian markets saw a positive trend as US stocks rallied, driven by a strong comeback in AI-linked technology shares. Lower oil prices provided further relief, boosting airline stocks and easing bond market pressure. Investors are now keenly awaiting crucial US inflation data, with expectations of a potential Federal Reserve rate hike later this year.

articles.title: Promoter sells Rs 1,024 crore worth of Ajanta Pharma shares in block deal to Kotak MF and ABSL MF
articles.description: A promoter entity of Ajanta Pharma sold shares worth over Rs 1,024 crore through a block deal, with Kotak Mahindra Mutual Fund and Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund acquiring the stake. The transaction comes amid strong earnings growth, healthy margins and sustained momentum in the companys pharmaceutical business.

articles.title: Royalty rate cuts aim to reduce costs, boost oil and gas exploration
articles.description: While lower royalties are expected to improve project viability and attract investment, concerns remain over poor prospectivity data, limited discoveries, and competition from more attractive regions

articles.title: Maharashtra Approves Rs 22,611 Cr Infra Push With MMR Tunnel, Navi Mumbai Metro Expansion
articles.description: The decisions are viewed as a major push to improve connectivity and ease traffic congestion across the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR).

articles.title: NSE to route 10% of CSR spending through Social Stock Exchange after regulatory green light
articles.description: NSE will channel 10% of its annual CSR corpus through the Social Stock Exchange, becoming an early institutional adopter of the platform. The move follows regulatory changes permitting CSR spending via SSE-listed instruments and aims to boost transparency, accountability and funding for social impact projects.

articles.title: Himachal Pradesh, Norway to collaborate on sustainability, waste mgmt
articles.description: Himachal Pradesh is collaborating with Norway to use its expertise and technologies for managing Construction and Demolition (C&D) waste. The partnership also extends to circular economy, sustainable tourism, renewable energy, and smart cities.

articles.title: Adani Energy Solutions to acquire IntelliSmart Infrastructure, a leading smart metering company
articles.description: Adani Energy Solutions has executed a binding securities purchase and subscription agreement (SPSA) to acquire a 100% equity stake in IntelliSmart Infrastructure, a leading smart metering JV between National Investment and Infrastructure Fund (NIIF) and Energy Efficiency Services Limited (EESL). The proposed acquisition will strengthen AESL's position as India's largest smart metering platform with over 4.7+ crore smart meters.

articles.title: Mehli Mistry widens challenge against Tata Trusts governance at SRTT
articles.description: Mehli Mistry has widened his challenge against Tata Trusts, filing a fresh objection against the Sir Ratan Tata Trust. He seeks the removal of five trustees, including Noel Tata, alleging conflicts of interest, financial impropriety and governance violations.

articles.title: NSE earmarks 10% of annual CSR corpus for Social Stock Exchange
articles.description: The NSE will earmark 10% of its annual CSR corpus for projects on its Social Stock Exchange. The move, enabled by recent regulatory changes, aims to boost transparent, outcome-oriented philanthropy and strengthen India's social impact financing.

articles.title: Corporate Laws Bill: Panel seeks views on decriminalisation, compliance
articles.description: The Joint Committee on the Corporate Laws Amendment Bill, 2026, is seeking stakeholder feedback. The bill aims to amend the Companies Act and LLP Act, focusing on decriminalising offences, easing compliance, and expanding corporate flexibility.

articles.title: Portable AC Vs Window AC: Which Cools Better And Costs Less To Run?
articles.description: As summer heat intensifies in India, many are choosing between portable and window air conditioners. Window ACs typically consume less power, offering better cooling efficiency, especially in larger or hotter spaces.

articles.title: Former Indian cricketer Ajit Agarkar sells Bandra West apartment for Rs 4 crore
articles.description: Bandra Real Estate: Discover Agarkar's luxury apartment sale in Mumbai's sought-after Bandra West for Rs 4 crore.

articles.title: Senior IAS officer Sajjan Singh Yadav appointed as CEO of Delhi Jal Board
articles.description: Yadav will replace former CEO Kaushal Raj Sharma, a 2006 AGMUT cadre officer, who was posted as Secretary to the Delhi Lieutenant Governor Taranjit Singh Sandhu in April this year

articles.title: Rajesh Exports Chairman Rajesh Mehta on LIC: 'No contact; don't even know where LIC's office is ... ' — Report
articles.description: "LIC has not purchased the shares yesterday or last year. LIC's purchases are over a period of time, approximately 20 years. These shares have been taken by LIC from the open market, from the stock market," Mehta told news agency PTI.

articles.title: Mutual funds trim stakes in 13 midcap stocks after two quarters of buying
articles.description: Mutual funds have reduced their holdings in 23 BSE midcap stocks in the March 2026 quarter, reversing earlier accumulation trends seen through mid-2025. Most of these stocks have delivered negative returns in CY26, with several falling sharply. The shift signals a cautious stance by institutional investors amid ongoing market weakness.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay reviews MAWS schemes, stresses timely completion of projects
articles.description: Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay emphasizes timely completion of MAWS projects and sustainable urban development in Tamil Nadu.

articles.title: Godrej Properties gains after Bengaluru-based residential project clocks sales of over Rs 2,000 crore
articles.description: Godrej Properties (GPL) added 0.99% to Rs 1666.95 after the company announced that it has sold homes worth over Rs 2,000 crore in its project, Godrej Vanantara, located off Bannerghatta Road, Bengaluru.

articles.title: Pandavapura taluk begins shift to organic farming; 10,000 farmers in Melkote hobli to take part in pilot
articles.description: Sustainable agriculture: Karnataka has picked Pandavapura as its second organic taluk, with Melkote hobli leading a pilot covering 70 villages. Officials aim to improve soil health, cut chemical use, certify crops and boost farmer incomes through cleaner produce.

articles.title: Volumes soar at Belrise Industries Ltd counter
articles.description: Belrise Industries Ltd clocked volume of 294.46 lakh shares by 14:14 IST on NSE, a 9.66 times surge over two-week average daily volume of 30.47 lakh shares

articles.title: SML Mahindra gains as May CV sales rise 12% YoY to 1,678 units
articles.description: SML Mahindra advanced 2.91% to Rs 3,820 after the company reported an 11.64% year-on-year increase in commercial vehicle (CV) sales to 1,678 units in May 2026, compared with 1,503 units sold in May 2025.

articles.title: SCSS calculator: Rs 20,000 monthly income for senior citizens; check investment required
articles.description: The Senior Citizens Savings Scheme (SCSS) is a government-backed savings scheme that offers regular income and low-risk returns to retirees. With the current interest rate of 8.2% per annum, senior citizens can generate a steady income stream through quarterly interest payouts. How can senior citizens earn Rs 20,000 monthly from SCSS?

articles.title: Cemindia Projects zooms 116% in 3 months; what's driving Adani Group stock?
articles.description: In the past 11 trading days, the stock price of Cemindia Projects has surged 37 per cent. In the past three months, the counter has yielded a multibagger return of 116 per cent.

articles.title: SpiceJet delays pilot salaries, seeks govt-backed loan to shore up finances
articles.description: SpiceJet was India's second-largest domestic carrier ​by market share in 2019, carrying roughly 15 per cent of passengers, but that has since fallen to a fourth-place share ​of 3.4 per cent

articles.title: OpenAI files for IPO, says AI should not concentrate power as it enters ‘third phase’ of growth
articles.description: Alongside the IPO announcement, OpenAI chief executive officer Sam Altman published a lengthy post outlining the company's vision for the next phase of AI development, arguing that artificial intelligence should be broadly distributed rather than controlled by a handful of companies or governments.

articles.title: Crude at $100, AI IPOs at $1 trillion, and gold on sale: What Peter McGuire says you should do now
articles.description: Peter McGuire of Australia-Trading.com highlights a chaotic market driven by rumors and geopolitics, not fundamentals. He predicts crude oil prices will rise, advises caution on trillion-dollar AI IPOs, and remains bullish on India for the long term. McGuire also suggests accumulating gold as it has fallen 20% from its peak.

articles.title: Redington shares rally 5% after Apple unveils new features at WWDC 2026
articles.description: Redington shares rose sharply on Tuesday after Apple unveiled a rebuilt Siri and a suite of AI-powered features at WWDC 2026. The rally reflects investor optimism over Redington's long-standing partnership with Apple, for whom it manages distribution, logistics and warehousing across India and several international markets.

articles.title: Rupee rebounds 20 paise to 95.41 against US dollar
articles.description: The Indian rupee strengthened by 20 paise against the US dollar in early trade on Tuesday, opening at 95.47. This gain was attributed to easing oil prices, a weaker US dollar index, and a de-escalation of tensions between Israel and Iran. Domestic equity markets also traded higher, reflecting positive sentiment.

articles.title: Wipro’s Rs 15,000 Crore Buyback Opens This Week: Check Date, Check Dates, Eligibility And Key Details
articles.description: Wpiro Buyback: Wipro’s Rs 15,000 crore buyback opens June 11. Check eligibility, entitlement ratios, key deadlines, and how shareholders can participate.

articles.title: Air India Ordered To Pay Over Rs 74,000 To Student For Denying Baggage Benefit, Delaying Refund
articles.description: A consumer commission enhanced compensation for a student after Air India admitted she qualified for a baggage benefit but failed to issue a promised refund.

articles.title: Databricks in talks to raise funds at over $165 billion, The Information reports
articles.description: June 8 : Data analytics software firm Databricks has discussed raising funds in a round that could begin next month and value it at between $165 billion and $175 billion, The Information reported on Monday, citing sources.Here are a few details: • Databricks, one of the most valuable privately held c

articles.title: Dollar hovers around two-month high as Iran-Israel truce hangs in balance
articles.description: The US dollar is strong, nearing a two-month peak. Middle East tensions are fueling demand for the dollar. Traders are also betting on the US Federal Reserve increasing interest rates later this year. Upcoming US inflation data will be crucial for the Fed's decisions. This situation could boost the dollar further and impact US stock markets.

articles.title: Petrol, Diesel & CNG Fresh Prices Announced: Check City-Wise Rates For June 9
articles.description: Fuel prices stay unchanged June 9 2026, but LPG and CNG see recent hikes, petrol costliest in Hyderabad, diesel in Thiruvananthapuram, lowest fuel prices in Chandigarh

articles.title: Asian stocks make tentative bounce after Israel, Iran halt attacks
articles.description: Japan's Nikkei inched up 0.3 per cent, after losing 3.9 per cent the previous session, while MSCI's broadest index of Asia-Pacific shares outside Japan rose 0.9 per cent

articles.title: Perplexity plans 2028 IPO regardless of Anthropic or OpenAI listings: Report
articles.description: OpenAI confidentially filed for a U.S. IPO earlier on Monday, following Anthropic's filing last week. Elon Musk's SpaceX is also preparing to go public on Friday.

articles.title: School Software To Metals Consultancy: Probe Questions Rs 2.78 Crore Paid To Veena Vijayan's Firm
articles.description: Investigators questioned how the company came to be engaged as an IT and marketing consultant for a mineral sands manufacturer.

articles.title: Vodafone Idea, Bharti Airtel shares in focus as Bombay HC quashes one-time spectrum levy
articles.description: Telecom stocks in news: This marked a major legal victory for the two companies after a long-running dispute with the Department of Telecommunications (DoT).

articles.title: OpenAI IPO: ChatGPT maker files paperwork, set to hit Wall Street soon
articles.description: AI giant OpenAI has confidentially filed paperwork for an initial public offering (IPO) with the SEC, signaling a potential Wall Street debut. While details remain undisclosed, the move aligns with a wave of anticipated tech listings, offering investors a chance to buy into leading AI firms.

articles.title: Hotel giants bet on India travel boom
articles.description: Major hotel groups are investing heavily in India. They expect a surge in domestic travel to drive growth. This expansion continues despite economic concerns. Prime Minister Modi encourages local holidays. India's tourism market is set for significant expansion. New hotels are planned across the country. This signals a bright future for Indian hospitality.

articles.title: ChatGPT-Maker OpenAI Eyes Stock Market Debut After Anthropic, Files Secret IPO Papers
articles.description: OpenAI confidentially files for US IPO, eyes valuation up to 1 trillion. ChatGPT hits 1 billion monthly users earlier.
